# Contributing to TX1.0 Earning System

Thank you for your interest in contributing!

## How to Contribute

### 1. Report Bugs
Create an issue with:
- Clear description
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected behavior

### 2. Suggest Features
Create an issue with:
- Feature description
- Use case
- Implementation ideas

### 3. Submit Pull Requests
- Fork the repository
- Create a feature branch
- Make your changes
- Submit PR

## Code Style
- Follow PEP 8
- Add comments
- Write tests

## Support This Project

If you find this project helpful, please consider:
- ⭐ Starring the repository
- 💖 Sponsoring via GitHub Sponsors
- 🛒 Purchasing digital products

**GitHub**: https://github.com/mecca2000/tx1-earning-system
